title: Abyssal Sovereigns
description: A mod that adds multitudes of eerie/scary dimensions into your game, all having their unique appearance, benefits and gameplay.
body:
### Forge version of this mod was abandoned - NeoForge REMAKE incoming soon!

# New Dimensions
This mod introduces you to new dimensions with all of them having their unique appearences, gameplay and lore.
In order to get the best experience out of the dimensions, these settings are suggested: "Ambience turned on and set to max", "Music turned on", "Graphics set to *Fabulous!*"

## Bloodroot Hollow
This dimension is an absolute curse! It is a disasterous idea to go there for any purpose at all!
- Extremely dark.
- Very hostile wildlife, they listen to you carefully and attack together when alerted.
- No easy way back, need a Magnetic Field Tracker to locate the portal back out of this dimension.
- Even your spawnpoint is trapped in this dimension until you get out! Only for the first entrance ever.

## Veiled Depths
This thalassophobia inducing deep dark ocean has an eerie loneliness. The entry to this dimension a shattering in the ground within ocean biomes, rarely found portal.
- Extremely dense underwater fog, unable to see more than few blocks in front of you.
- Unsettling severity of loneliness and an eerie ambience.
- Rich for minerals and materials.
- Home of big leviathan monsters.
- The fog (veil) can be lifted with "Apple of the Seas".

## Apocalypsed Earth
This dimension was once the home of a human civilization. And they destroyed their world by messing with Bloodroot Hollow's anomalies.
- Tan sky color, sun and clouds, dense dusty fog.
- Ashes floating in the air, decreasing air quality.
- Full of coarse dirt and destroyed trees.
- Something is always stalking you.

## Echovale
This dimension isn't meant to be explored like any other. It's a prison. Players and entities can be sent here with the potion effect, which is obtained by brewing the new item that drops from Warden into an awkward potion!
- Absolutely full of Deep Dark biome.
- Players cannot break or place any blocks.
- Useful way to get rid of annoying monsters or creatures from your world.

## Bioflora Wilds
Step into a land brimming with life, but plagued by monstrous creatures spreading a purple disease. Can you cleanse the land and make it a peaceful home once again?
- A strange, purple disease spreads throughout the land.
- Defeat the monsters responsible to rid the land of the corruption.
- Once cleansed, the Bioflora Wilds will bloom, allowing for a peaceful landscape.

# 

### Beta Notice

The mod is currently still development, beta version will release once the dimension(s) are more stable and is usable within survival. The mod currently breaks in multi-player.

You can look into the **Gallery** or **Changelog** section for more information about the mod! But expect spoilers when doing so!

Each recipe needed will be given into the recipe book at appropriate times, so if you don't have mods such as "Just Enough Items" to keep track of recipes, you won't have to worry about it.
